query:
SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, status, classification, teamMemberId, duration, 
       LEFT(recordingUrl, 100) as recordingUrlShort, createdAt 
FROM calls 
WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading', 'failed')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, status, classification, teamMemberId, duration, 
       LEFT(recordingUrl, 100) as recordingUrlShort, createdAt 
FROM calls 
WHERE status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading', 'failed')
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
